evals.name: investor-deck-vietnexus
evals.prompt: We're raising a seed round for VietNexus, an 'Innovation OS' that matches Vietnamese startups with investors, corporate partners, and universities using semantic RAG + graph-based relationship matching. We have a working platform live at dqplus.ddns.net, three pilot universities interested, and we're asking for $500k. I'm pitching to a Southeast-Asia-focused VC next week in a 10 minute slot. Create the pitch deck.
evals.expected_output: A deck-spec.md following the investor structure (10-12 slides) with story-headline per slide, bullets, visual suggestions, speaker notes, plus a valid Slidev slides.md with speaker notes and a clear $500k ask slide.
assertions: deck-spec.md exists and every slide entry has a Headline, Visual suggestion, and Speaker notes
slides.md exists and is structurally valid Slidev (opening headmatter block, slides separated by --- lines)
every slide in slides.md carries speaker notes as a trailing HTML comment block
deck follows the investor structure with 10-12 slides covering problem, solution, market, traction, team, and ask
the $500k ask appears on a dedicated ask slide
slide headlines are takeaway sentences, not bare labels like 'Market Size' or 'Team'
slide bodies are concise: no more than 5 bullets and roughly 30 words per slide body

evals.name: sales-deck-bank-cto
evals.prompt: need a sales deck — we sell DataTrust, a data-quality monitoring SaaS, and I've got a 20 min meeting with the CTO and head of data at a mid-size Vietnamese bank (they've had two regulatory reporting incidents this year caused by bad data). pricing is $3k/mo standard, $8k/mo enterprise. goal of the meeting is to get them to commit to a 6-week paid pilot
evals.expected_output: A deck-spec.md following the sales structure (8-10 slides) framed around the bank's problem and cost of inaction, with the pilot as the explicit next-steps ask, plus a valid Slidev slides.md.
assertions: deck-spec.md exists and every slide entry has a Headline, Visual suggestion, and Speaker notes
slides.md exists and is structurally valid Slidev (opening headmatter block, slides separated by --- lines)
every slide in slides.md carries speaker notes as a trailing HTML comment block
deck follows the sales structure: the bank's problem and cost of inaction come before the product pitch
the deck personalizes to the prospect by referencing the regulatory reporting incidents
a pricing slide presents both the $3k/mo and $8k/mo tiers
the final ask is explicitly the 6-week paid pilot with concrete next steps
slide headlines are takeaway sentences, not bare labels

evals.name: demo-day-underspecified
evals.prompt: i need slides for demo day next friday. 5 minutes. we do AI-powered matching for startups and investors. make it punchy
evals.expected_output: A compressed ~5-6 slide deck (problem, solution, demo, traction/validation, team, ask) with explicitly stated assumptions filling the gaps (company name, ask, traction), plus a valid Slidev slides.md.
assertions: deck-spec.md exists and every slide entry has a Headline, Visual suggestion, and Speaker notes
slides.md exists and is structurally valid Slidev (opening headmatter block, slides separated by --- lines)
every slide in slides.md carries speaker notes as a trailing HTML comment block
deck is compressed for the 5-minute format: roughly 5-7 content slides, not a full 12-slide investor deck
assumptions made to fill the underspecified prompt (name, ask, traction) are explicitly stated rather than silently invented as fact
the final content slide contains a clear ask
slide headlines are takeaway sentences, not bare labels
